---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? A sentence or two is enough.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen. Be specific — endpoint paths, request /
response shapes, env vars, etc.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you weigh?

## Use case

A concrete scenario: who benefits, how often, what changes.

## Out of scope

Anything this should explicitly NOT do.
